title: Bipartisan Bicameral Lawmakers Introduce Tax Credit to Expand Renewable Natural Gas and Cut Emissions
content: Congressman Brian Fitzpatrick (PA-1) and Congresswoman Linda SÃ¡nchez (CA-38) have joined forces with Senators Thom Tillis (R-NC) and Mark Warner (D-VA) to introduce the Renewable Natural Gas Incentive Act of 2025 at a bicameral level. This legislation proposes a $1.00-per-gallon tax credit for renewable natural gas (RNG) used or sold as fuel for motor vehicles, motorboats, or aviation. The proposed legislation expands credit eligibility to certified blended RNG and the credit would remain in place through 2035.
author: Analysts Account
